response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and demonstrated production-scale systems work (millions of requests/sec, millions of mail operations), but fundamentally misaligned with the role's core focus on experimentation and growth platforms. Resume shows zero evidence of A/B testing frameworks, experimentation infrastructure, metrics platforms, or growth engineering—areas that define this Principal-level position and require 4+ years of dedicated experience per the job description.
strengths: Proven ability to design and operate production systems at scale across multiple technology stacks and domains
Staff-level engineer currently at re:cinq with exposure to AI infrastructure and developer tooling, showing continued growth trajectory
Deep language proficiency in all required technologies (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript) across 20-year career
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or A/B testing infrastructure—core to this role's purpose
Resume lacks evidence of metrics-driven work, data science collaboration, or statistical analysis experience required for measurement platform design
Limited evidence of leading large-scale cross-functional initiatives or multi-team influence; career trajectory shows primarily individual contributor roles
